63.reason: [This check is incorrect: popping a 0 is valid; only popping from an empty stack is an error. This will wrongly print "error" for legitimate 0 values.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [This check is incorrect: popping a 0 is valid; only popping from an empty stack is an error. This will wrongly print "error" for legitimate 0 values.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Incorrect error condition: popping a 0 is valid; only popping from empty stack is an error. This causes false "error" output when 0 is popped.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [This condition incorrectly treats a popped value of 0 as an error. But 0 is a valid integer that can be pushed and popped. The error should only occur when popping from an empty stack.]
